subject: WM-0116 review: changes_requested
body: Medium: compact main menu surface is not viewport-bounded or scrollable; at 800x720/1024x720 the panel starts at y=-48 and language section extends below viewport (bottom=747), and at 390x720 language buttons extend to y=842. Default desktop/diagnostics/i18n checks otherwise pass: typecheck, web-shell e2e, desktop-shell e2e, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.
